ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "mouse_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the mouse used in the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the system used in the experiment */,
  "session_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the session type conducted during the experiment */,
  "good_runs" REAL /* Number of successful runs in the experiment */,
  "raw_data_loc" TEXT /* Location of the raw data files */,
  "save_location" TEXT /* Location where processed data files are saved */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project to which the experiment belongs */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data files */,
  "data_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the data files in bytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data files */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_mouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("mouse_id") REFERENCES mice ("mouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_session_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_type_id") REFERENCES session_types ("session_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mice" (
  "mouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mouse */,
  "mouse_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the mouse */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the mouse */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the mouse */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the mouse */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the mouse */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the mouse */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the mouse */,
  "cage_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the cage where the mouse is housed */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the mouse */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions where the mouse is housed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mice_cage_id FOREIGN KEY ("cage_id") REFERENCES cages ("cage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system or setup */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system or setup */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the system */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the system */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "maintenance_log" TEXT /* Log of maintenance activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_types" (
  "session_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session type */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session type */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol followed during the session */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the session */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cages" (
  "cage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cage */,
  "cage_type" TEXT /* Type of the cage */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cage */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the cage (number of mice it can house) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cage_id")
)
